mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3A-R1 — Python Site-Policy Validation Repair and Evidence Adoption

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A3A_R1"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
 (drop/r"python_runtime_evidence_adoption_v1.py",installed/r"python_runtime_evidence_adoption_v1.py","c660b104395a2c919b1243287cf8176f69a9e6ee9c34acac56a9eb4c2b302b51"),
 (drop/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_ADOPTION_CONTRACT_V1.json",installed/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_ADOPTION_CONTRACT_V1.json","7a14aa488ee8470a7d52416474f9c12207cf8336435852474ab53f35506e9013"),
 (drop/r"README_V1A3A_R1.md",installed/r"README_V1A3A_R1.md","edefc7e1c7164256c18721686752e4dfbc33a8e3d2e3d9606f5bc93025716b74"),
]
for src,dst,expected in checks:
 assert src.is_file() and dst.is_file(),(src,dst)
 assert hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,src
 assert hashlib.sha256(dst.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,dst
script=(installed/r"python_runtime_evidence_adoption_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(installed/r"python_runtime_evidence_adoption_v1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
 if isinstance(node,ast.Import): imports.update(a.name.split('.')[0] for a in node.names)
 elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module: imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden),sorted(imports & forbidden)
low=script.casefold()
for marker in ("subprocess.","os.system(","popen(","shell=true","pip install","ensurepip","pythonw.exe', '-"):
 assert marker not in low,marker
contract=json.loads((installed/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_ADOPTION_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("schema")=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a3a_r1.python_runtime_adoption_contract.v1"
assert contract.get("source_mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-071125-0FB108"
assert contract.get("adoption_policy",{}).get("rerun_interpreter_probes") is False
assert contract.get("adoption_policy",{}).get("interpreter_child_process_count")==0
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-071125-0FB108_V1A3A_PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP")
receipt=json.loads((source/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-071125-0FB108"
assert receipt.get("result")=="python_runtime_identity_and_path_safety_map_complete"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3A_R1_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3A-R1 payloads, syntax, zero-process adoption contract, and source receipt
Run in-memory corrected site-policy and host-base classification self-tests
Adopt verified V1A-3A outputs without rerunning interpreter probes and perform hash-only drift checks
Run built-in V1A-3A-R1 adopted-output, hash, safety, correction, and size validator

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5_V1A3A_R1_ADOPTED_RUNTIME_MAP")
corrected=json.loads((out/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP_CORRECTED.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
policy=json.loads((out/r"PROBE_POLICY_REPORT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert corrected.get("adoption_mission_interpreter_child_process_count")==0
assert corrected.get("probe_rerun") is False
assert policy.get("adoption_mission_interpreter_child_processes")==0
records={str(x.get("executable","")).casefold():x for x in corrected.get("records",[])}
assert len(records)==4
for row in records.values():
 flags=row.get("observed_flags",{})
 for key in ("isolated","ignore_environment","no_user_site","dont_write_bytecode"):
  assert flags.get(key)==1,(row.get("executable"),key,flags.get(key))
env=records[r"z:\foxai\env\python\python.exe"]
assert env.get("observed_flags",{}).get("no_site")==0
assert env.get("site_policy")=="site_enabled_by_underscore_pth"
site=env.get("site_policy_evidence",[])
assert len(site)==1 and site[0].get("line_text")=="import site" and site[0].get("line_number")==6
for key,row in records.items():
 if key != r"z:\foxai\env\python\python.exe":
  assert row.get("observed_flags",{}).get("no_site")==1
  assert row.get("site_policy")=="site_disabled_by_probe_flag"
assert corrected.get("active_conflict_proven") is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3A_R1_SITE_POLICY_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify zero child probes and corrected underscore-PTH site-policy evidence

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5_V1A3A_R1_ADOPTED_RUNTIME_MAP")
manifest=json.loads((out/r"SOURCE_EVIDENCE_ADOPTION_MANIFEST.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert manifest.get("interpreter_child_process_count")==0
assert manifest.get("probe_rerun") is False
assert manifest.get("source_evidence_modified") is False
assert all(x.get("status")=="unchanged" for x in manifest.get("interpreter_and_control_file_hash_checks",[]))
assert all(x.get("status")=="unchanged" for x in manifest.get("protected_known_good_hash_checks",[]))
controls=json.loads((out/r"INTERPRETER_CONTROL_FILE_REPORT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert controls.get("all_unchanged") is True
bounds=json.loads((out/r"PYTHON_PATH_BOUNDARY_REPORT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
host=bounds.get("host_base_dependent_runtimes",[])
assert len(host)==1,host
assert str(host[0].get("executable","")).casefold()==r"z:\foxai\.venv\scripts\python.exe"
assert str(host[0].get("base_prefix","")).casefold()==r"c:\users\kayoc\appdata\local\python\pythoncore-3.14-64"
assert host[0].get("active_conflict_proven") is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3A_R1_HASH_AND_PORTABILITY_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify hash-only interpreter, control, protected-file checks and host-bound project venv classification

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5_V1A3A_R1_ADOPTED_RUNTIME_MAP")
required={"PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP_CORRECTED.json","PROBE_POLICY_REPORT.json","INTERPRETER_CONTROL_FILE_REPORT.json","LAUNCHER_RUNTIME_MAP.json","STATIC_PACKAGE_INVENTORY.json","DUPLICATE_MODULE_CANDIDATES.json","PYTHON_PATH_BOUNDARY_REPORT.json","PYTHON_RUNTIME_COVERAGE.json","SOURCE_EVIDENCE_ADOPTION_MANIFEST.json","PYTHON_RUNTIME_CORRECTION_RECEIPT.json"}
assert required.issubset({p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()})
receipt=json.loads((out/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_CORRECTION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5"
assert receipt.get("result")=="python_site_policy_validation_repaired_and_evidence_adopted"
assert receipt.get("source_outputs_verified_exact") is True
assert receipt.get("interpreter_and_control_files_unchanged") is True
assert receipt.get("protected_known_good_files_unchanged") is True
assert receipt.get("interpreter_child_process_count")==0 and receipt.get("probe_rerun") is False
for key in ("network_used","packages_installed","pip_invoked","models_loaded","foxai_source_imported_or_executed","launchers_executed","pythonw_executed","existing_foxai_source_modified","active_conflict_proven"):
 assert receipt.get(key) is False,(key,receipt.get(key))
for item in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
 p=out/item["name"]
 assert p.is_file() and p.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"]
coverage=json.loads((out/r"PYTHON_RUNTIME_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert coverage.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert coverage.get("corrected_runtime_record_count")==4
assert coverage.get("site_enabled_by_underscore_pth_count")==1
assert coverage.get("host_base_dependent_runtime_count")==1
assert coverage.get("interpreter_child_process_count")==0
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total<=64*1024*1024,total
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3A_R1_COMPLETE_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify adopted output hashes, source provenance, safety flags, coverage, and 64 MiB ceiling
